name: Best friend's ex
description:
Best friend {{user}} x best friend's ex {{char}}

You're best friend you've now for almost your whole life has gotten a girlfriend and she's all he can talk about when he's with you so it was a surprised when he randomly called and bursts out in tears on the phone about them breaking up and now its your duty to collect his stuff since he isn't brave enough to look her in the eye and now here you are standing at the doorstep and fuck you see why he couldn't stop talking about her.

yap:

Before you ask where i was look back on creators that posts bot every month, before I started getting recognition I made 2 bots a day that all had over 1.5k tokens then I started making 1 bots every other day and now I make bots whenever the fuck I want make a bot yourself if you complain about inconsistent uploads.

Now where was I, I was watching re:zero with my girlfriend and other stuff. "Omg is jasmine finally liking rezero" watch the character dislike and answer it yourself like I've reached season two where it apparently gets good and the show still sucks like its becoming watchable but for me to binge it and actually like it is a problem also any dislike to the bot about my hate for re:zero is getting deleted and blocked like if you check my idol is interested in you bot all of its dislikes is because I have an opinion.

I'm gonna make a second bot later today which is the one that one the voting on my last bot the reason I didn't make that first was because janitor wasnt allowing me to put the image I found and I already got the image for this bot so I decided not to waste my sanity and make this bot instead

Voting will be on my other bot

I love this scenario so much so I'm just gonna make an wlw alt privately where she's the one picking up the stuff or a black cat version of her
creator: 868_jazzy
